string.text:
The Saiga-23 was developed by Zone mechanics for hunting the most brutal mutants. Inspired by the Russian KS-23K prototype, the weapon is based on the Saiga-12 platform and reconfigured in a bullpup layout for improved mobility. It was then modified to fire powerful 23x75 mm shells and equipped with a 510 mm KS-23 barrel. The result is an extremely deadly close-quarters weapon.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Optics: most Picatinny/Weaver reflex sights.
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: Khryak 23
